title: V1.67 P0 — Local API Surface Convergence (FE1-ORCH + CASING + F-P3 + F-F1)
completion_summary: P0 Done. QC 3/3 Approve after fix-wave-1; QA Pass (cargo test --all + clippy --all + drift + web 110 + desktop green).
